raw.message:
🧬 The Exclusive DNA Offer is here! It combines the rare DNA you need with a massive Energy refill. ⚡
🔔 This deal won't be around for long, so head to the shop 👉 https://pxfd.co/pixelshopda and grab yours now!

hook.summary: A treasure chest opens to reveal glowing, colorful DNA strands under an 'Exclusive DNA Offer' headline.
hook.visual_action: A wooden chest with a gold emblem opens against a blue diamond background, releasing vibrant DNA helixes.

scene_flow: Introduction of a closed treasure chest with promotional text.
The chest opens, revealing colorful DNA strands.
A 'GET NOW' button appears to prompt user action.
The scene holds on the final offer state with the open chest.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy collection-based progression and special rewards.
